official_name: National Institute of Standards and Technology
notes: NIST provides the official US government perspective on security weaknesses. Authoritative federal agency with regulatory influence, research-backed, referenced in executive orders and regulations.

match_nodes.description: NIST AI 100-2 Adversarial Machine Learning Taxonomy

data.official_name: NIST AI 100-2 Adversarial Machine Learning Taxonomy
data.description: Official NIST taxonomy for adversarial machine learning attacks. The authoritative US government classification of ML security threats.
data.notes: First edition January 2024. Categorizes attacks by stage (training time vs inference time). Complements MITRE ATLAS (TTPs) with weakness taxonomy. Referenced in AI executive orders and policy. Updates expected as field evolves.

data.note: No per-category URL. All categories are documented in the NIST AI 100-2 publication (PDF and web).

examples.note: Privacy attack: determining if data was in the training set
